content: I appreciate all your reflections truly...as to what truth I would have others feel? I would have them know not only that the 'system' they regard as inevitable and unchangeable is not perpetually tolerable for life on this planet, and I would have them wake up to saner alternatives. This is my passion and has been since discovering the concepts propounded by TVP and similar and related schools of thought. It has been the basis of my activity on the Internet, and as such I am able to answer as to whether I believe humanity is ascending?
